findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products. Only MindShift implements it. Violates Foundation Law compliance across ecosystem.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all product codebases for Energy Adaptation logic. Implement fallback heuristic in ZEUS, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, VOLAURA within 72h.

findings.issue: Code-index older than 7 days (last update: 2026-04-21). Agents are simulating without current context. CRITICAL per audit protocol.
findings.recommended_fix: Reindex immediately using CLI job `atlas-reindex --full`. Validate agent responses against live code post-index.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 Amendment unimplemented in BrandedBy: badges shown immediately post-assessment, violating 'no immediate contingent reward' rule.
findings.recommended_fix: Delay badge reveal by minimum 2h or until unrelated user action. Align with MindShift behavior.

findings.issue: Open debt DEBT-230: $230 AZN duplicate 83(b) filing loss unaddressed. Class 21 meta-failure pattern active.
findings.recommended_fix: Append journal entry, set intensity=5, update balance. Enforce ledger rule before next wake.

whistleblower_flag: Law 2 non-compliance across 80% of ecosystem violates ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md Part 1. Immediate cross-product enforcement required.
